description: A single NA propagates through an aggregate without na.rm, returning NA and masking otherwise valid results.
body: Failure mode: mean, sum, or another aggregate is called without na.rm on a column containing NA, so the whole result is NA and the missingness goes unnoticed downstream. Detection signals: an aggregate that is NA when most values are present; summaries with unexpected NA cells; == NA used as a missingness test returning NA. Do not aggregate NA-bearing columns without a decision. Safer fallback: inspect NA counts first, set na.rm or filter deliberately, and log how many rows were excluded.
